benefits.description: Lost 20 lbs from March to current (215 to 195 lbs)
Continuing to build muscle while cutting fat

side_effects.description: Tirzepatide making it hard to eat enough protein
Poor sleep quality despite stopping benzodiazepines

protocol_notes: Started TRT in March 2025 at 50mg/week (200mg split 4x weekly). Started Tirzepatide in June 2025, currently at 7.5mg weekly. Extensive supplement stack including multivitamins, magnesium, vitamin D, B vitamins, L-theanine, L-tyrosine, amino acids, Cialis 5mg daily, Reishi, Lions Mane, Ashwagandha, ALA, NAC, zinc, L-arginine, fish oil, creatine, DIM, milk thistle, and pre/probiotics. Diet: 100-125g protein daily, low carb, no processed foods. User is impatient with progress despite acknowledging good direction. Takes Adderall as needed. Stopped benzodiazepines on psychiatrist recommendation.
